prediction.reasoning: For an 18-day forecast of IBM stock, I used a random walk model with drift based on typical large-cap stock volatility. IBM has shown relatively stable price movements as a mature tech stock. I assumed an annualized volatility of approximately 25% and minimal drift, scaling to an 18-day period. The confidence intervals reflect increasing uncertainty at higher confidence levels, with the 18-day time horizon allowing for moderate price variation around the current level.
